conflicts.description: intel-mlc: Installation of intel-mlc requires acceptance of the EULA found at https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/download/736633/intel-memory-latency-checker-intel-mlc.html. Set the +license-agreed variant to confirm acceptance of the agreement.
conflicts.name: ~license-agreed

description:
Intel® Memory Latency Checker (Intel® MLC) is a tool used to measure
memory latencies and b/w, and how they change with increasing load on
the system. It also provides several options for more fine-grained
investigation where b/w and latencies from a specific set of cores to
caches or memory can be measured as well.
name: intel-mlc

variants.description: Build systems supported by the package
variants.name: build_system

variants.description: Confirm acceptance of the EULA presented after clicking download at (https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/download/736633/intel-memory-latency-checker-intel-mlc.html)
variants.name: license-agreed
